sizing_rule.note: Worst-case scenario analysis as foundation for position sizing. Methodology references optimal f (Ralph Vince framework) but specific parameters (optimal_f value, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown_tolerance) are not provided in excerpt. Implementation requires historical trade analysis to calculate optimal f from worst-case drawdown scenarios.

source_rule_text: Build position sizing strategy from worst-case scenario analysis as the foundational starting point for money management.
